item.title: Semiconductor technologies for sub-1nm chips
item.summary: Extreme ultraviolet (EUV) systems, volumetric printing, and 2D materials are all advancing for structures under 1nm in size for the next generations of high-performance semiconductors. The prospect of sub-1nm chips in the next few years is becoming increasingly realistic, as highlighted by the technology roadmap at imec in Belgium and IBM’s recent announcement of a […] The post Semiconductor technologies for sub-1nm chips appeared first on eeNews Europe .
